2 #define ARCGEOSIM_NUMERICS_EXPRESSIONS_LOGLINEARPIECEWISEFUNCTION_LOGLINEARINTERPOLATOR_H
3 /* Author : dechaiss at Tue Oct 20 14:12:57 2009
4  * Generated by createNew
5  */
6 
7 #include <arcane/utils/UtilsTypes.h>
8 #include <arcane/utils/Math.h>
9 #include <vector>
10 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/Expressions/PieceWiseFunction/IPieceWiseFunction.h"
11 
12 namespace Arcane
13  {
14 
15  }
16 using namespace Arcane;
17 
18 class LogLinearInterpolator
19  {
20 public:
22  LogLinearInterpolator()
23  {
24  ;
25  }
26 
28  virtual
29  ~LogLinearInterpolator()
30  {
31  }
32 
33 public:
34 
35  enum eProlongationType
36  {
37  ConstantProlongation, LinearProlongation
38  };
39 
40  //** Interpolator interval data type */
41  typedef Real IntervalData;
42 
44  inline static Real
45  interpolate(const Real* const x, const Real* y, const IntervalData* const coef,
46  const Real v)
47  {
49  return math::pow(10., *coef * (v - *x) + *y);
50  }
51 
53  inline static Real
54  differentiate(const Real* const x, const Real* const y,
55  const IntervalData* const coef, const Real v)
56  {
57  return math::pow(10., *coef * (v - *x) + *y) * *coef;
58  }
59 
61  inline static void
62  updateGhostPoints(const eProlongationType& prolongation_type,
63  Real* const x_begin, Real* const x_end, Real* const y_begin,
64  Real* const y_end)
65  {
66  switch (prolongation_type)
67  {
68  case (ConstantProlongation):
70  *x_begin = *(x_begin + 1);
71  *x_end = *(x_end - 1);
72  *y_begin = *(y_begin + 1);
73  *y_end = *(y_end - 1);
74  break;
75  case (LinearProlongation):
77  *x_begin = *(x_begin + 1);
78  *x_end = *(x_end - 1);
79  *y_begin = *(y_begin + 1);
80  *y_end = *(y_end - 1);
81  break;
82  };
83  }
84 
86  inline static const IntervalData&
87  getForbiddenInterval(const Real& forbidden_interval_value)
88  {
89  return forbidden_interval_value;
90  }
91 
93  inline static void
94  getConnectedIntervalNumber(Integer & nb_linterval, Integer & nb_rinterval)
95  {
96  nb_linterval = 1;
97  nb_rinterval = 1;
98  }
99 
101  inline static IntervalData
102  getDefaultInterval()
103  {
104  return 0;
105  }
106 
108  static void
109  computeIntervalCoef(const Real* const x_left_bound,
110  const Real* const y_left_bound, const Integer& interval_number,
111  IntervalData* const interval_coeff)
112  {
113  *interval_coeff = (*(y_left_bound + 1) - *y_left_bound)
114  / ((*(x_left_bound + 1) - *x_left_bound));
115  }
116 
118  inline static void
119  updateGhostIntervals(const eProlongationType& prolongation_type,
120  Real* const x_begin, Real* const x_end, Real* const y_begin,
121  Real* const y_end, Real* const interval_begin, Real* const interval_end)
122  {
123  switch (prolongation_type)
124  {
125  case (ConstantProlongation):
127  *interval_begin = 0;
128  *interval_end = 0;
129  break;
130  case (LinearProlongation):
132  *interval_begin = *(interval_begin + 1);
133  *interval_end = *(interval_end - 1);
134  break;
135  }
136  }
137 
139  inline static void
140  getInterpolatorType(
141  PieceWiseFunctionType::eInterpolatorType & interpolator_type)
142  {
143  interpolator_type = PieceWiseFunctionType::LogLinearInterpolator;
144  }
145 
146  };
147 
148 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_NUMERICS_EXPRESSIONS_LOGLINEARPIECEWISEFUNCTION_LOGLINEARINTERPOLATOR_H */
